Package com.softsynth.tools.view

Class Summary
EditableRotaryKnob Wrapper for a RotaryKnob that adds an optional TextFieldDouble and an optional Label.
JAppletFrame Frame that allows a program to be run as either an Application or an Applet.
RotaryKnob RotaryKnob like on a synthesizer.
TextFieldDouble TextField that turns pink when modified, and white when the double value is read from it.
